headline: Could not verify Curve LlamaLend’s admin/upgrade path from on-chain sources in this run

findings.text: Identified Curve DAO Voting contract address on Ethereum (0xE478…3356) but did not read on-chain parameters/roles in this run.
Identified Curve DAO Ownership Agent (0x4090…9968) used by governance for execution, but did not read its admin/permissions in this run.
Identified OneWayLendingFactory for LlamaLend on Ethereum (0xeA68…05E0); owner/admin not read on-chain in this run.
Identified Curve Emergency DAO multisig address on Ethereum (0x4679…1E0c); threshold/signers and precise scope over LlamaLend not verified on-chain in this run.
Did not determine whether the OneWayLendingFactory or LlamaLend markets are proxy-based or immutable from on-chain reads in this run.

rationale.verdict: Unable to determine the fast-path upgrade/control authority and delays for LlamaLend this run: owners/admins on factory/markets (C1), upgradeability/proxy admins (C2), execution path and any timelocks (C3), full multisig scopes/thresholds (C4), Aragon Voting parameters (C5), and emergency powers over markets (C6) were not read on-chain.

evidence.shows: Curve DAO Voting contract address on Ethereum
Curve DAO Ownership Agent contract address on Ethereum
Curve Emergency DAO multisig address on Ethereum
Curve LlamaLend OneWayLendingFactory contract address on Ethereum
CRV governance token contract on Ethereum
Audit report covering Curve Lending components relevant to LlamaLend
Audit report covering crvUSD and LLAMMA mechanisms used in Curve's lending system
Canonical repository for crvUSD and related lending/LLAMMA code
Curve core contracts monorepo used across protocol components
Curve DAO contracts repository (Voting/Agent and related)

unknowns: C1: Could not read on-chain owner/admin for OneWayLendingFactory (Ethereum) during this run.
C1: Could not identify and read the newest LlamaLend market deployments on Ethereum/Arbitrum/Fraxtal to confirm their owners/admins.
C2: Could not determine from on-chain reads whether factory/markets are proxy-based (Transparent/UUPS/Beacon/Diamond) or immutable; proxy admin (if any) unknown.
C2: Could not determine whether the Curve DAO Voting/Agent are upgradeable proxies and who their proxy admins are.
C3: Could not trace the full execution path from DAO vote to execution (Voting → Agent → target) and measure any timelock/delay on the uncontested fast path.
C4: Did not enumerate all multisigs with reachable control over LlamaLend (emergency committees, module-level admins) or verify their thresholds/signers and exact scopes.
C5: Did not read on-chain Aragon Voting parameters (proposal threshold, voting period, quorum) or any queue/execute delays.
C6: Could not confirm emergency/guardian roles for LlamaLend (pause/kill/parameter caps) and which actor (DAO vs Emergency DAO multisig) wields them.
C7: Without C1–C6, could not classify the highest power tier reachable on the fast path over LlamaLend user funds.

protocol_metadata.about: Curve LlamaLend is Curve’s isolated lending system built around its crvUSD/LLAMMA design, where users open per-market borrowing positions against volatile collateral and manage them within market-specific contracts deployed by a factory. The broader control surface ties into the Curve DAO (Aragon Voting + Agent), with an Emergency DAO multisig for operational responses. Specific admin/upgradability details and delays vary by deployment and were not verified on-chain in this run.
